mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visitor_vehicle (user_id, license_plate, visitor_name, visit_purpose, visit_date, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{licensePlate}, #{visitorName}, #{visitPurpose}, #{visitDate}, 'APPROVED', NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT visitor_vehicle_id, user_id, license_plate, visitor_name, visit_date, visit_purpose, status, created_at FROM visitor_vehicle
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{req.startIdx}, #{req.size}
SELECT visitor_vehicle_id, user_id, license_plate, visitor_name, visit_date, visit_purpose, status, created_at FROM visitor_vehicle WHERE visitor_vehicle_id = #{visitorVehicleId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_vehicle SET license_plate = #{licensePlate}, visitor_name = #{visitorName}, visit_purpose = #{visitPurpose}, visit_date = #{visitDate}, status = #{status} WHERE visitor_vehicle_id = #{visitorVehicleId}
UPDATE visitor_vehicle SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE visitor_vehicle_id = #{visitorVehicleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitor_vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND visit_date = CURDATE() AND status = 'APPROVED' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitor_vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND visit_date > CURDATE() AND status = 'APPROVED' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitor_vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
